description: The bottom-right AI Action log overlay now only appears in spectator (AI vs AI) games — in human-vs-AI play the AI's actions live in the game log instead of a duplicate floating overlay. When it IS shown (spectator mode), it must float to the LEFT of the right-hand control panel (HUD_Right) and never overlap it, so any controls stay visible and clickable. This drives set_spectator_mode(true) to enable the overlay, then asserts the positioning regression still holds.

steps.script: main.get_node("AIActionLogOverlay").add_action_entry(2, {}, "AI fires overwatch with Allarus Custodians at Deffkoptas (4.6 expected hits)")
